description: Marriage contract (ketubba). Location: Fustat. Dated: Monday, 1 Ḥeshvan 12[..] Seleucid, which is 888–987 CE. Bride: Zahra bt. ʿAlī. The groom's name is missing. Witnessed by Shelomo b. [...], Ṣadoq b. Yiṣḥaq (signed also ENA 2556.12 (PGPID 15839) ca. late 10th century), Ḥabīb b. ʿAday, Moshe b. Shelomo, ʿEli b. Ḥasan b. Ba[bad?]. On verso there is an unidentified and difficult to read text in Hebrew. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: כתובה. מקום: פוסטאט. תאריך: יום שני, א' חשוון 12[..] לשטרות (888–987). כלה: זהרה בת עלי. שם החתן חסר. על הגב: טקסט עברי שקשה לפענחו.
